men.summary: The Bluejays are struggling through a disappointing 15-17 season with a below-.500 Big East record of 9-11, having gone just 3-7 in their last 10 games and currently riding a one-game losing streak. With a poor 2-8 record against Quadrant 1 opponents and significant struggles away from home (4-8), Creighton faces an uphill battle to secure any postseason tournament bid.

women.summary: The Bluejays find themselves at .500 overall with a 16-15 record and an 11-9 mark in Big East play, though their 0-5 record against Quadrant 1 opponents and 6-8 road performance highlight significant weaknesses against quality competition. Despite a strong 7-3 record over their last 10 games before their current one-game losing streak, their resume lacks the signature wins typically needed for an at-large NCAA Tournament bid, making them likely bubble candidates at best.
